summary: Filter-empty state correctly displays required messaging and maintains proper visual hierarchy. The screen shows 'No customers match the current filters' as specified, with search/filter controls intact and appropriate suggestion text.

violations.description: The filter-empty suggestion text 'Try broadening your search or status filter' could be more specific about which filters are currently applied, though this is a minor UX enhancement rather than a contract violation

actions: Verify search input shows the applied filter value 'zz-vim-no-match-zz' is properly displayed
Confirm status dropdown shows 'All statuses' selection is visible and functional
Test that clearing the search filter restores the customer list or shows dataset-empty state as appropriate
